description: Cross-process error codes. Numbers are stable forever; never renumber, never reuse.

codes.name: INVALID_ARGUMENT
codes.description: Caller-supplied argument failed validation at a system boundary.

codes.name: STOCK_NOT_FOUND
codes.description: Stock code unknown to the meta repository.

codes.name: META_STALE
codes.description: Stock metadata snapshot too old to serve.

codes.name: KLINE_DATA_MISSING
codes.description: K-line cache missing for the requested symbol/range.

codes.name: NL_TRANSLATION_FAILED
codes.description: LLM failed to translate natural language → DSL.

codes.name: UNIVERSE_TOO_LARGE
codes.description: Requested universe exceeds the configured cap.

codes.name: PATTERN_REFERENCE_LOOKAHEAD
codes.description: Pattern matcher would require future bars (look-ahead) — refused.

codes.name: SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
codes.description: External data source unreachable / all fallbacks exhausted.

codes.name: RATE_LIMITED
codes.description: External data source returned rate-limit error.

codes.name: LLM_FAILED
codes.description: LLM call failed (timeout / non-2xx / malformed response).

codes.name: CACHE_CORRUPTED
codes.description: Local Parquet/DuckDB cache file failed integrity check.

codes.name: CACHE_KEY_NOT_FOUND
codes.description: Requested key/record absent from the cache layer.

codes.name: CACHE_BACKEND_UNAVAILABLE
codes.description: Cache backend (filesystem, db) unreachable / locked / out of disk.
